related.name: XV. The Devil
related.teaser: The Devil is the shadow of matter — chains of illusion where desire binds the soul to form.

related.name: NUMBERS
related.teaser: Monad is the point before all division — the radiant seed, the single flame from which the ten thousand things unfold.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: ᛁ Isa
related.teaser: Isa is the winter bar — the breath held before the next tide.

related.name: ᛒ Berkano
related.teaser: Berkano is the green cradle — the crescent that becomes a garden.

related.name: ♑ Capricorn
related.teaser: Capricorn is the mountain goat — climber of peaks, builder of law, anchor of time.

related.name: Freyr
related.teaser: Freyr embodies fertility, love, prosperity — under Venus; in Taurus.

related.name: Jarilo
related.teaser: Jarilo embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.

related.name: Persephone
related.teaser: Persephone embodies spring, descent and return — under Venus; in Virgo, Pisces.

related.name: ♉ Taurus
related.teaser: Taurus is the fertile ground — patient bull, body of Earth, keeper of roots.

related.name: ♍ Virgo
related.teaser: Virgo is the wheat of Earth — patient harvester, discerning servant, keeper of order.
